page_metadata.biotools__summary: PyBDEI is a python package that implements tools for fast and accurate maximum likelihood estimation of Birth-Death Exposed-Infectious (BDEI) epidemiological model parameters from phylogenetic trees.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PyBDEI is a python package that implements tools for fast and accurate maximum likelihood estimation of Birth-Death Exposed-Infectious (BDEI) epidemiological model parameters from phylogenetic trees.
